formulas.name: Species Succession
formulas.formula: Pioneer species → Intermediate species → Climax species
formulas.variables: Pioneer species, Intermediate species, Climax species

formulas.name: Hardy-Weinberg Equation
formulas.variables: p (frequency of dominant allele), q (frequency of recessive allele)

formulas.name: Genetic Drift
formulas.variables: p' (new frequency), p (initial frequency), Δp (change in frequency), N (population size)
formulas.notes: Change in allele frequency due to genetic drift

formulas.name: Mutation Rate
formulas.formula: μ = (Number of mutations / Total number of individuals) × 100
formulas.variables: μ (mutation rate), Number of mutations, Total number of individuals
formulas.notes: Rate of mutation in a population

formulas.name: Gene Flow
formulas.formula: Nm = (Number of individuals migrating / Total population size) × 100
formulas.variables: Nm (gene flow), Number of individuals migrating, Total population size
formulas.notes: Rate of gene flow in a population
